title: GoldenPayload
description: The irreducible geometric primitive of a Spacedeck SVM settlement intent.

intent_id.description: Unique deterministic identifier for the intent.

source_asset.description: The SPL token asset to be liquidated.

target_asset.description: The SPL token asset to be acquired.

amount_usd.description: The total value of the intent in USD manifest.

wallet_id.description: The physical Solana (SVM) base58 wallet address authorized for the strike. EVM addresses are strictly rejected.

vector_type.description: The topographical manifold for settlement. STRICTLY SVM.
